title: Amazon invests $50B in OpenAI, deepens AWS partnership with expanded $100B cloud deal
summary: "We think they’ll be one of the big winners in AI, we can help them grow, and we believe we’ll earn a strong return for Amazon over the long term," said Amazon CEO Andy Jassy. Read More
author: Taylor Soper

title: Trump directs all government agencies to stop using Anthropic's AI tools
summary: President Donald Trump on Friday announced all federal agencies, including the Department of Defense, would immediately stop the use of Anthropic's AI technologies.
author: Maura Barrett

title: Acing this new AI exam — which its creators say is the toughest in the world — might point to the first signs of AGI
summary: Humanity’s Last Exam is a PhD-level benchmark designed to test the limits of AI reasoning. Although Google’s Gemini 3 scored a staggering 48.4%, experts stress that this does not indicate the arrival of artificial general intelligence (AGI).
author: Tristan Greene
